channel.title: Programme on 1st Anytown Scouts
channel.description: Recent content in Programme on 1st Anytown Scouts

item.title: Beavers — Summer Term 2026
item.description: A bright, gentle Summer term for Beavers — finishing with a Colony sleepover at the hut.

item.title: Cubs — Summer Term 2026
item.description: This term we’re building towards the Naturalist activity badge and a weekend Pack camp at Anytown Common. A typical Cubs term: fire-lighting, map work, a community visit, and plenty of outdoor time. Half-term falls in week 8 — no meeting that week.

item.title: Scouts — Autumn Term 2025
item.description: Last autumn’s Scouts programme — kept here for District audit and as a demonstration of the archive view (set params.programme.keep_archive true to see it in the listing).

item.title: Scouts — Autumn Term 2026
item.description: A look ahead to next autumn — published early so parents can plan around the weekend hike and Remembrance parade.
